特朗普競選陣營撤回對密歇根州投票結果的訴訟

美國總統特朗普的競選團隊表示，正在撤回對密歇根州具有爭議的投票結果的訴訟。特朗普的私人律師朱利亞尼發表聲明，表示在當地星期四早上，撤回有關訴訟。民主黨的拜登在密歇根州的得票，領先特朗普15多萬票。另外，威斯康星州選舉委員會宣布，將應特朗普陣營的要求，重新點算當地兩個縣的選票，重點工作在星期五展開，12月1日前完成。特朗普一方早前已支付300萬美元，用以重新點算當地兩個縣的選票。特朗普一方指控多個縣出現違規行為，但未有實質證據。根據目前的點票結果，拜登以超過2萬票優勢，在威斯康星州勝出。

replies.msg:
(1) 啱啱記者會講嗰啲 affidavit 有好多都係hearsay，同埋没有指出犯法嘅票站主任/票站人員的名字，變相法庭無法傳召有關人員作證，有關 affidavit 變相係不可靠證據，因而被多個州法院駁回。相信去到最高法院都會同樣方法處理。

(2) Dominion Voting System 呢個point，如果真係有證據，係有機會直接推翻選舉結果，但係法律界就唔睇好喇。明明係最重要嘅理據，到而家都仲未拎到選票 switching 的確實數字出嚟，記者會仲要擺到最後尾先講，推測應該係無料扮四條。

(3) Double voting with absentee ballots。Giuliani 靠的是 affidavit 證據，不是任何州份的官方票站或選民登記資料，好大機會不被法院接納。Affidavit 係任何人 9up 都可以寫到一份出嚟；相反，票站主任和州選舉部門的選民登記資料係可以核對。一核對之下，法院不會接納 affidavit 作為證據。

今次成個美國法律界都食緊花生，個個都等緊最高法院判侵侵敗訴之後，侵侵同 Giuliani 之間會唔會反面唔認人

侵侵同自己人反面的例子多不勝數

侵連唔連任我唔敢講,但兒登上到台機會依家越黎越細

(1) 啱啱記者會講嗰啲 affidavit 有好多都係hearsay，同埋没有指出犯法嘅票站主任/票站人員的名字，變相法庭無法傳召有關人員作證，有關 affidavit 變相係不可靠證據，因而被多個州法院駁回。相信去到最高法院都會同樣方法處理。

(2) Dominion Voting System 呢個point，如果真係有證據，係有機會直接推翻選舉結果，但係法律界就唔睇好喇。明明係最重要嘅理據，到而家都仲未拎到選票 switching 的確實數字出嚟，記者會仲要擺到最後尾先講，推測應該係無料扮四條。

(3) Double voting with absentee ballots。Giuliani 靠的是 affidavit 證據，不是任何州份的官方票站或選民登記資料，好大機會不被法院接納。Affidavit 係任何人 9up 都可以寫到一份出嚟；相反，票站主任和州選舉部門的選民登記資料係可以核對。一核對之下，法院不會接納 affidavit 作為證據。

今次成個美國法律界都食緊花生，個個都等緊最高法院判侵侵敗訴之後，侵侵同 Giuliani 之間會唔會反面唔認人

侵侵同自己人反面的例子多不勝數

侵連唔連任我唔敢講,但兒登上到台機會依家越黎越細

(1) 啱啱記者會講嗰啲 affidavit 有好多都係hearsay，同埋没有指出犯法嘅票站主任/票站人員的名字，變相法庭無法傳召有關人員作證，有關 affidavit 變相係不可靠證據，因而被多個州法院駁回。相信去到最高法院都會同樣方法處理。

(2) Dominion Voting System 呢個point，如果真係有證據，係有機會直接推翻選舉結果，但係法律界就唔睇好喇。明明係最重要嘅理據，到而家都仲未拎到選票 switching 的確實數字出嚟，記者會仲要擺到最後尾先講，推測應該係無料扮四條。

(3) Double voting with absentee ballots。Giuliani 靠的是 affidavit 證據，不是任何州份的官方票站或選民登記資料，好大機會不被法院接納。Affidavit 係任何人 9up 都可以寫到一份出嚟；相反，票站主任和州選舉部門的選民登記資料係可以核對。一核對之下，法院不會接納 affidavit 作為證據。

今次成個美國法律界都食緊花生，個個都等緊最高法院判侵侵敗訴之後，侵侵同 Giuliani 之間會唔會反面唔認人

5. When communism believes in common ownership, dictatorship believes in individual ownership.

replies.msg:
Check U.S. Federal Rules of Evidence, Rules 801-805.

The general rule is that hearsay evidence is inadmissible unless it falls within one of the exceptions. Affidavit itself is hearsay evidence in most scenarios (e.g the stories mentioned by Giuliani in his news conference).

Giuliani is trying to invoke the exception that the witnesses are being threatened and therefore cannot testify in court.

This may not work as expected because it is a constitutional appeal case that concerns the legitimacy of Elections’ results and, thus, a witness must stand before the court to give his testimony and face cross-examination.

In addition to being a hearsay evidence which is inadmissible, affidavit alone, without the opportunity by the opponents to question the witness’ evidence, is not a credible piece of evidence. The witnesses in question do not give evidence as an expert and, therefore, the expert witness exception does not apply.

The number of “witnesses” and “affidavits” does not matter. The applicant must call the witnesses in court and show their evidence.

The next rule is that the official records are generally more credible than the laymen’s affidavit. If GOP claims that cheating occurs during vote counting, the GOP representatives at the counting center should have raised an issue. The affidavit of a low level employees at the counting center is generally less credible than the GO0 representatives’ testimony. Giuliani did not mention whether any GOP representative would give testimony.

Summary
1. In communism, the society or the community is on top of everything. But in dictatorship, it is the dictator who governs everything. Society or community is only secondary for dictatorship.
2. Communism regards the society or community as powerful. But in dictatorship, it is the dictator who is the most powerful.
3. In communism, the profit is shared equally in the community. Whereas in dictatorship, the profit is accumulated in only one person.
4. Dictatorship is a system in which a single person rules the nation. On the other hand, in communism the power is not vested in a single individual.
5. When communism believes in common ownership, dictatorship believes in individual ownership.
6. In communism, every one is equal. But in dictatorship, there are no equals.

http://www.differencebetween.net/miscellaneous/difference-between-communism-and-dictatorship/

Communism: Key Features
Communism is a socialist movement aimed at creating a classless social order in which property and the means of production are communally owned. As a socialist movement, communism advocates that citizens work together to control their economy and distribute goods based on need and social relationships. Modern communism has been largely shaped by the work of Karl Marx, a 19th-century philosopher and economist who believed communism would be achieved through a worker-led revolution.

Dictatorship: Key Features
A dictatorship is an autocratic government ruled by an individual -- the dictator -- or authoritatively by an oligarchy or a central political party. A government controlled by one person or a small group of people is the most common form of dictatorship. Dictators often have a reputation for pushing their own agenda. Therefore, in contemporary terminology, the word dictator is also used to mean a person that rules without respect for law or sociopolitical pressure. Such a person may have been elected democratically, but has used his influence to remain in power or exert unnecessary control.
https://classroom.synonym.com/difference-communism-dictatorship-5796.html

A dictatorship is a unitary form of government characterized by a single leader or group of leaders and little or no toleration for political pluralism or independent programs or media.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dictatorship
